pi_items.source: Code analysis: seed_library.py seed_duplicate_merge() creates 10 papers × 2 copies (Copy A + Copy B) = 20 total items
Code analysis: NEURO_PAPERS array in seed_library.py contains exactly 10 neuroscience papers
Code analysis: seed_duplicate_merge() inserts NEURO_PAPERS (10 papers), each with exactly one NEURO_NOTES entry attached to Copy A

pi_items.metadata_value: Synaptic Plasticity and Memory: An Evaluation of the Hypothesis
pi_items.verified_value: Synaptic Plasticity and Memory: An Evaluation of the Hypothesis (title correct, but paper authors are S. J. Martin, P. D. Grimwood, R. G. M. Morris, not Malenka/Bear as in seed_library)
pi_items.source: Web search + PubMed confirmed real paper exists. Title matches. Authors in seed_library are INCORRECT (shows Malenka/Bear but actual authors are Martin/Grimwood/Morris)

pi_items.verified_value: An Integrative Theory of Prefrontal Cortex Function (different title, year is 2001 not 2000)
pi_items.source: Web search found Miller & Cohen paper: actual title is 'An Integrative Theory of Prefrontal Cortex Function', published 2001 vol 24 pages 167-202 in Annual Review of Neuroscience, NOT 2000. seed_library metadata year is WRONG

pi_items.metadata_value: Cortical Oscillations and the Binding Problem
pi_items.source: Web search found related work by Singer & Gray on binding hypothesis but could not confirm exact 1994 publication with this title. Found references to 1995 work. Likely year is incorrect in seed_library

pi_items.key: papers_with_notes[8]: Neural Basis of Visual Attention
pi_items.source: Web search found Desimone & Duncan's seminal work 'Neural mechanisms of selective visual attention' from 1995 Annual Review of Neuroscience, NOT 2000 Nature Reviews Neuroscience as in seed_library. Exact 2000 publication could not be confirmed

pi_items.metadata_value: Basal Ganglia and the Control of Action Selection
pi_items.source: Web search found Redgrave/Prescott/Gurney published computational models in Biological Cybernetics 2001. Could not confirm exact 2007 publication with this title and authors

privileged_info_summary: The task seeds 20 Zotero library items (10 neuroscience papers duplicated). Each paper appears twice: Copy A with one attached researcher note, Copy B bare. The 10 papers are real published works in neuroscience, though several metadata entries contain errors: the first paper's authors are incorrect (lists Malenka/Bear instead of actual authors Martin/Grimwood/Morris), the Hebbian Synapses paper metadata is from wrong publication (Brown/Kairiss/Keenan 1990 vol 13, not Levy/Steward 1992 vol 15), the Prefrontal Cortex paper is from 2001 not 2000 with different title, and several other papers' publication details could not be verified (The Role of Dopamine in Neuron, Cortical Oscillations 1994, Neural Basis of Visual Attention in Nature Reviews, Basal Ganglia 2007). Despite these metadata discrepancies, the titles and basic structure are correctly implemented: 20 items total, 10 unique papers, each with exactly 1 note on Copy A.
